$description: Captured from components/ui/select/select.tsx — WIRED: the cva/class strings consume the generated --select-* vars.

radius.$description: Corrected in Phase 4: source uses rounded-lg (the Phase-1 draft said rounded-md).

maxVisibleItems.$description: DESIGN DECISION 2026-07-13: the menu shows 5 rows and scrolls past that. Five is enough to scan without the popover swallowing the page; beyond it, a scrollbar is a clearer affordance than a list that runs off-screen.

maxHeight.$description: 5 rows + the content padding = 148px at the current values. Kept as a live calc so changing maxVisibleItems or the row height moves it. The rendered max-height is min(this, --radix-select-content-available-height) so the menu never overflows the viewport either.

height.$description: One row: py-1 (4+4) + the 20px line box of text-sm = 28px. This is measured, not guessed — the max-height below is built from it.

gap.$description: Between the leading icon and the label.

radius.$description: CONCENTRIC: --select-content-radius (10) − --select-content-padding (4) = 6px. A nested corner must be the outer radius MINUS the padding, or the gap at the corner stops matching the gap along the edge and the inner box looks pinched. Derived, not picked off the scale.

$extensions.looloo.previous: rounded-md (hardcoded — there was no token at all)

select.$comment: A select row is a VALUE, not an action. There is no value you cannot undo, so there is no destructive select item — anything destructive is a command and belongs in a Dropdown menu. (Those tokens existed briefly on 2026-07-13 and were removed.)
